sources.title: Legacy Of Blood 1978
sources.description: Three wicked siblings and their equally unsavory partners arrive at a remote inn where they mean to attend the reading of their uncle's will. One by one, the heirs are dispatched by an unknown killer.

metadata.Plot: Horror movie about three wicked sisters and their equally unsavory husbands who all arrive at a remote inn where they mean to attend the reading of their uncle's will. One by one, the heirs are dispatched by an unknown killer.
metadata.Actors: Elaine Boies, Louise Gallandra, Jeannie Cusick
